quoteFirst: It was Jones again, who said he had entered the Palace twice by scaling the wall and getting in at a window, and had been there from Tuesday night to
quoteLast: on Thursday morning, secreting himself under different beds.
title: The early court of Queen Victoria
author: Jerrold, Clare, 1861-1937

quoteFirst: The police vigilance to prevent the gathering of any crowd was kept up until
title: The Wizard of Wall Street and His Wealth; or, The Life and Deeds of Jay Gould

quoteFirst: "I will ask your leave to lie down with them and sleep until
quoteLast: . I have said farewell at home; the boat is already carefully hidden and safely moored, so that I have nothing to call me away."
title: The Two Dianas, Volume 2 (of 3)
author: Meurice, Paul, 1820-1905; Dumas, Alexandre, 1802-1870 [Dubious author]; Van Meyden, E. [Illustrator]

quoteFirst: Our brigade was instructed to move forward soon after
quoteLast: to assault the series of blockhouses which was regarded as impregnable by the foreign attaches.

quoteFirst: About nine o’clock arms had been stacked, knapsacks slung, and the Forty-Second detachment marched from the wharf, passing between lines of General Magruder’s force drawn up in the streets of Galveston, and proceeded to some empty houses in the suburbs, where the men remained until
title: History of the Forty-second regiment infantry, Massachusetts volunteers, 1862, 1863, 1864
author: Bosson, Charles P. (Charles Palfray)

quoteFirst: But when, after a long and restless night, she arose in the morning, anticipating with painful impatience the hour of her departure, Mrs Pemberton entered her room, and informed her that she had passed nearly all the night at Miss Woodville's bed-side, who had been seized with a violent delirium
quoteLast: in the morning, and in her ravings was continually calling on Mrs Mowbray, and begging to see her once more.
title: Adeline Mowbray; or, The Mother and Daughter
author: Opie, Amelia, 1769-1853

quoteLast: on Thursday, January 21, we again went to the palace, and found a similar _mise-en-scène_.
title: A mission to Gelele, King of Dahome, Vol. 2 (of 2)
